snippet.title: DIGGER | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Digg. Or Die. DIGGER. Only in theaters October 2. #Diggermovie



Academy Award winner Tom Cruise stars in Academy Award-winning filmmaker Alejandro G. Iñárritu’s original film “Digger,” from Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures.
The most powerful man in the world embarks on a frantic mission to prove he is humanity’s savior before the disaster he’s unleashed destroys everything.
Cruise stars in the title role, alongside Oscar winner Riz Ahmed, John Goodman, Oscar nominee Sandra Hüller, Michael Stuhlbarg, and Oscar nominee Jesse Plemons.  Robert John Burke, Emma D’Arcy, Burn Gorman and Sophie Wilde also star. 
Iñárritu directed from a screenplay by Iñárritu & Oscar-winners Alexander Dinelaris & Nicolás Giacobone, and Sabina Berman, story by Iñárritu & Berman.  The film is produced by Iñárritu, Oscar nominee Mary Parent, Cruise and Michael Sharp, and executive produced by Joshua Grode, Berman, Dinelaris, Giacobone, Jez Butterworth and Emmanuel Lubezki.
Joining Iñárritu behind the camera are previous collaborators Oscar-winning director of photography Emmanuel Lubezki; editors Conor O’Neill and Oscar winner Stephen Mirrone; Oscar-nominated costume designer Jacqueline West; Oscar-winning makeup and hair designer Alessandro Bertolazzi; and Oscar-nominated casting director Francine Maisler; along with Oscar-winning production designer Dennis Gassner and production designer Richard Johnson, Oscar-winning prosthetic makeup designer Kazu Hiro, and composer Cosmo Sheldrake.
An Alejandro G. Iñárritu Film, “Digger” was shot entirely in VistaVision and will be released in theaters and IMAX® across North America on October 2, 2026, and internationally beginning 30 September 2026.  It will be distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

Covering House Of The Dragon Season 3 Episode 5 Trailer Breakdown & Easter Eggs. Episode 4 Ending Aftermath, Daeron Targaryen & Tessarion. Ormund Hightower vs Rhaenyra, Episode 7 Battle of Tumbleton footage, Alys Rivers and Aemond at Harrenhal with Vhagar, Criston Cole vs Alys Rivers. Rhaenyra vs Alicent Scenes. Rhaenyra Iron Throne. Ormund Hightower's plan to steal the Dragonseeds Hugh Hammer Vermithor. House Of The Dragon Season 3 Episode 6, Episode 7 and Episode 8 Finale Trailer footage. Aegon and Sunfyre at Rooks Rest. 

House Stark, Knight Of The Seven Kingdoms Connection to Dunk and Egg. The Isle of Faces, God's Eye, Green Men, Daemon & Rhaenyra Arc, Daeron Targaryen, Ormund Hightower, Cregan Stark, Roderick Dustin and the Stark Army Winter Wolves. Black Alys Alysanne Blackwood. Daemon & Rhaenyra. The Fall of King's Landing, Battle Of The Gullet, other major battles. Aemond at Harrenhal. Daemon vs Aemond, The Gods Eye, Helaena Dragon Dreams, Daemon Visions, Three Eyed Raven. The Fake Daeron Targaryen Explained.

Why Alys Rivers wants Aemond. House Of The Dragon Season 2 Episode 8 Finale Aftermath and Ending Explained. Daemon Sees Daenerys Targaryen, all of Daemon's Weirwood Visions. The Three Eyed Raven Brynden Rivers, The Bloodraven. Knight Of The Seven Kingdoms Trailer connection. House Of The Dragon Season 3 Teaser. Rhaenyra on the Iron Throne. Helaena Dragon Dreams upgrade.

New History and Lore, Vermithor, Silverwing, Dragonseeds, Hugh Hammer, Ulf White, Seasmoke Addam Hull, Sheepstealer, Daeron Tessarion. Alys Rivers. Why Daemon and Rhaenyra Take King's Landing, Fall of King's Landing. How they trick Aemond and Vhagar.

Riverlands Battle, House Stark Returns, Cregan Stark Easter Eggs. House Tully. House Of The Dragon Season 3 Episodes. Vermithor, Arrax Lucerys Dragon, Moondancer Baela, Rhaena Sheepstealer, Aegon II Sunfyre, Helaena Targaryen Dreamfyre. Helaena Targaryen Dragon Dreams and how she tells the future. Aegon The Conqueror and Valyria Explained. Daemon Targaryen and Vermithor Explained. Dance of The Dragons Trailer and A Song of Ice And Fire Book Easter Eggs. Jon Snow Daenerys Targaryen Family History and Lore.

More House of the Dragon Season 3 and Knight Of The Seven Kingdoms  Season 2 videos soon. And the Aegon's Conquest Movie!

snippet.title: Mastodon - Snakes For Dinner (Official Video)
snippet.description:
You have all been asking for it, so we are excited to announce our new album, Marrow Deep, will be released August 28th, 2026 and we are kicking it off with a new video for our new song “Snakes For Dinner”, which features an appearance from our long time friend, Josh Homme.

It’s been quite the journey making this album, and we are very happy with how it came out, we can not wait for you to hear the whole thing! Until then, check out the new video, and pre-order a copy of the album today. Stay tuned, we’l keep bringing you updates, content and bunch of other cool fun stuff!

As always, thank you for being part of our world. We look forward to seeing you all on the Poisonous Weapons Tour and beyond!

Pre-order: https://i.mastodonrocks.com/shop
Pre-save: https://i.mastodonrocks.com/marrowdeep
Stream: http://i.mastodonrocks.com/snakesfordinner

Directed by DEATHCATS
Production Company: Another Video
Executive Producer: Doug Klinger
Producer: Hannah Alline
DP: Patrick Jones
Production Designer: SJ Prusakowski
HMU: Haley Dani
Wardrobe: Kay Stogner
SXF Makeup: Lisa Poe
Post Producer: Maria Paula Quesada
Edit, Color, and VFX: Supernova
Director’s Rep: LAB Inc

Lyrics:
Snakes For Dinner
What’s left to say
Thought I’ve seen it all
Broke our circle
Hitting us too hard
Innocence
Shattered light
Coming in
Hearts alive

When you left you took the moon and stars
Buried them deep underneath the ocean
When you left you took our hearts and minds
All that I could find amongst the grime were memories

Fault and reason
Make my head spin
Welcome failure
To become my friend

Where am I in the lense of your eyes

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community.  Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: MIRROR《同往》（Kizuna）Official Music Video
snippet.description:
獨自面對，還是我們一起面對的，都捱得過。
來，不要覺得被世界放棄。
我們相信，我們可以，你都一定可以。

#MIRROR #同往 #MIRRORweare 

－－－

《同往》

作曲：張繼聰
填詞：鄭敏
編曲：蘇道哲
監製：蘇道哲

曾經聲音失去過
曾經傷口都擦破
難關若衝得過 等於誰亦都可

無論做過瘋癲的壯舉
無論受過不安感佔據
無論住過憂鬱堡壘去寫出詩與句
無懼我跟你 一起追

多少等待和飄蕩
想追趕最遠星光
（如十二種方式 編了角色 在找終點的答案）

會有各自目標 想去衝 得我至懂
（當你也相同）
似個身體 各細胞 輸與送
（痛的 都會 一齊痛）

受挫 為過 犯錯 飽經抱恙
（試過都重傷）
練戲 練舞 練過 怎麼說唱
（想跟你 一起撐上）
是各自要遇上千億次 興奮和惆悵
只要 敢要 幻想

So I write you in our song  
Side by side we’re staying strong 
無分彼此身世 只想跟你 尚有力氣都耗光
前路要分岔的去闖 （多麼嚮往）
一樣凝望終點一撮光 
沿途即管回看 平行的跑道
有著我追趕

當丟失地圖迷路星海
（如十二顆星體都各散於暗黑中）
當分開四散 始終撲空
（星海裡幾經失重）
要見証十二星座繁星照遍太空
（亦可抵抗黑洞）
最闊星海 也跨越到
（最遠的星也觸摸到）

受挫 為過 犯錯 飽經抱恙
（要痛得漂亮）
任性 為了 活過 即使勉強
（肩碰上肩 互相撐上）
要是各自要遇上千億次 興奮和惆悵
千個 （億個）
方向 （幻想） Ohhh

So I write you in our song 
Side by side we’re staying strong 
獨有一種天賦與及異能是你別要驚慌
前路要分岔的去闖 （多麼嚮往）
只為凝聚終點一撮光 
沿途陰天晴朗 遲或早起步
也有我單擋
